properties.description: Detects possible SQL injection attempts in Linux web access syslog records, including DVWA/Apache local6 logs. Broad lab rule covering boolean, UNION, time-based, database enumeration, comment/operator, and file/command SQLi patterns.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where ProcessName has "apache_access" or Facility == "local6"
| extend msg = tolower(SyslogMessage)
| where msg has_any (
    "%27", "'", "%22", "+or+", "%20or%20", " or ", "or1", "1=1", "%3d",
    "union", "%20union%20", "select", "%20select%20", "information_schema",
    "sleep(", "benchmark(", "waitfor", "pg_sleep(",
    "xp_cmdshell", "load_file", "outfile", "dumpfile",
    "concat(", "group_concat", "database()", "version()", "user()",
    "--", "%2d%2d", "/*", "%2f%2a", "%23"
)
| extend SqlInjectionPattern = case(
    msg has_any ("%27", "'", "+or+", "%20or%20", " or ", "or1", "1=1", "%3d"), "Boolean-based SQL injection",
    msg has_any ("union", "%20union%20"), "UNION-based SQL injection",
    msg has_any ("sleep(", "benchmark(", "waitfor", "pg_sleep("), "Time-based SQL injection",
    msg has_any ("information_schema", "database()", "version()", "user()"), "Database enumeration SQL injection",
    msg has_any ("xp_cmdshell", "load_file", "outfile", "dumpfile"), "File or command SQL injection",
    msg has_any ("--", "%2d%2d", "/*", "%2f%2a", "%23"), "SQL comment/operator abuse",
    "Possible SQL injection"
)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, HostName, ProcessName, Facility, SeverityLevel, SqlInjectionPattern, SyslogMessage
